prompts.name: Japanese Town
prompts.text: Place the scene in a quiet Japanese town with narrow streets, tiled roofs, vending machines, utility poles, and everyday local detail.

prompts.name: Old Kyoto Alley
prompts.text: Place the scene in an old Kyoto-style alley with wooden buildings, stone paths, lanterns, and refined traditional atmosphere.

prompts.name: Tokyo Crossing
prompts.text: Place the scene at a busy Tokyo-inspired crossing with crowds, lights, signs, tall buildings, and energetic urban motion.

prompts.name: European Old Town
prompts.text: Place the scene in a European old town with cobblestone streets, warm windows, aged stone, and historical charm.

prompts.name: Parisian Street
prompts.text: Place the scene on a Parisian-style street with elegant buildings, café seating, trees, and refined city atmosphere.

prompts.name: Rainy London Street
prompts.text: Place the scene on a rainy London-style street with wet pavement, old brick, umbrellas, and muted city light.

prompts.name: Mediterranean Village
prompts.text: Place the scene in a Mediterranean village with white walls, blue accents, stone paths, and bright coastal sunlight.

prompts.name: Desert Bazaar
prompts.text: Place the scene in a desert bazaar with fabric awnings, warm dust, spices, lanterns, and lively market texture.

prompts.name: Nordic Village
prompts.text: Place the scene in a Nordic village with wooden houses, snow or pine trees, warm windows, and crisp northern air.

prompts.name: Tropical Island
prompts.text: Place the scene on a tropical island with palm trees, clear water, bright flowers, and relaxed humid atmosphere.

prompts.name: Mountain Temple
prompts.text: Place the scene at a mountain temple with stone steps, prayer flags or lanterns, mist, and high-altitude calm.

prompts.name: Coastal Harbor
prompts.text: Place the scene in a coastal harbor with boats, ropes, sea air, wooden docks, and soft maritime light.

prompts.name: Rural Countryside
prompts.text: Place the scene in a rural countryside with fields, fences, simple houses, open sky, and peaceful daily life.

prompts.name: Island Shrine
prompts.text: Place the scene near an island shrine surrounded by sea breeze, stone torii, bright water, and quiet sacred atmosphere.

prompts.name: Futuristic Tokyo
prompts.text: Place the scene in a futuristic Tokyo-like city with vertical signage, neon, sleek transit, and dense advanced urban detail.
